# flag-prune

> Remove completed feature flags safely from JavaScript and TypeScript.

## Quick start

Preview a change:

```sh
npx flag-prune --set 'useFlag("new-checkout")=true' ./src
```

Review the diff, then write it:

```sh
npx flag-prune --set 'useFlag("new-checkout")=true' --write ./src
```

Run your project's typecheck, lint, dead-code elimination, and tests after writing the change.

## Full documentation

- [flag-prune documentation](https://github.com/Tymek/flag-prune/blob/master/docs/README.md)
